title: Table-Based Fact Verification (TabFact)
description: Verify textual claims against structured tabular data from Wikipedia. Based on TabFact (Chen et al., ICLR 2020). Annotators determine whether a natural language statement is entailed or refuted by the contents of a given table, highlight evidence cells, and provide reasoning.
citation:
@inproceedings{chen2020tabfact,
    title = "TabFact: A Large-scale Dataset for Table-Based Fact Verification",
    author = "Chen, Wenhu  and Wang, Hongmin  and Chen, Jianshu  and Zhang, Yunkai  and Wang, Hong  and Li, Shiyang  and Zhou, Xiyou  and Wang, William Yang",
    booktitle = "International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)",
    year = "2020",
    url = "https://arxiv.org/abs/1909.02164"
}
